ranked_themes.reason: Dead-center activation: cluster_002's exposure that the developing world has always lived under might-makes-right, cluster_022's Gaza-versus-Ukraine double standard, and cluster_025's unexamined convergence on critique all land squarely in Marley's territory — the gap between what is said and what is lived, colonial extraction's continuing forms, and the language of the powerful describing the experience of the powerless.

The entire debate over 'the West' is conducted within Babylon's own vocabulary, and neither the conservative nor progressive position centers the experience of those colonized by Western civilization — Marley's prophetic lineage exists precisely to testify from outside that frame, naming what 'civilization' has meant for the powerless.

Gaza's exclusion of Palestinians from their own peace process and Ukraine's moral gap between stated principles and imposed outcomes activate Marley's core commitment to testimony on behalf of the powerless; the stretch is that delivering this testimony as song to 750 business professionals at breakfast tests exactly whether the form still carries when the delivery context has been domesticated.

The material roots of populism — working-class betrayal, economic inequality — touch Marley's concern with the gap between promise and lived condition, but the theme is dominated by institutional strategy and definitional disputes (EU legitimacy, firewalls, populism taxonomies) that push him into frameworks he testifies against rather than within, making any contribution both angled and stretching.

flat_themes.reason: Detailed strategic, fiscal, and alliance-management analysis — defense spending trade-offs, burden-sharing formulas, transatlantic institutional architecture — falls squarely in Marley's goes-flat-on territory of institutional and legal frameworks where he has no distinctive prophetic ground.

The theme is framed as regulatory design — algorithmic governance, transatlantic speech-norm harmonization, platform accountability mechanisms — which requires arguing within institutional frameworks rather than testifying against them, leaving Marley without distinctive ground despite a thin thread about whose voice gets silenced.
